overview: Medical Equipment Planning Full-Cycle Medical Services Medical Equipment Planning — From First Blueprint to Final Handover At Al Karam, we collaborate as a team with healthcare facility owners, developers, and operators at every stage, whether you're building a new hospital, expanding a clinic, or opening a specialized department. One team, end-to-end accountability. Most healthcare projects hit costly delays — wrong equipment specs, late procurement, installation clashes, missed MEP requirements. At Al-KARAM Medical Devices, we eliminate every one of those risks by owning the process from day one to handover. Whether your project is still a sketch on paper or already under construction — we step in, take charge, and deliver a healthcare facility that is built right, equipped right, and ready to save lives. Concept & design planning Vendor-neutral technical specifications Full procurement & tendering management Supply, installation & commissioning Our Process Every phase of your project, covered From the earliest concept stage through procurement, installation, and go-live, our biomedical engineers and planners are with you at every decision point. Basis of Design & Technology Report “Planning” We define the technology level of your facility, review available medical equipment platforms, and deliver a clear set of recommendations tailored to your operational and financial goals. Budgetary BOQ “Planning” A preliminary and final medical bill of quantities with cost forecasts — so you understand total equipment investment before committing to a design direction. No surprises later. Loaded Drawings & Layout Drawings “Design” Scaled layouts showing placement of medical equipment and furniture systems — validating architectural flow and space efficiency at the concept stage, with apply preliminary utility requirements (MEP), and multidisciplinary coordination to ensure functional efficiency. Detailed Drawings & Room Data Sheet “Design” Fully detailed plans with MEP requirements for every room — the definitive construction-ready document set, room data sheets, equipment schedules, and development of coordinated detailed level. Equipment Rigging Plans “Design” We map safe delivery and installation routes for heavy equipment throughout the building — coordinating structural loads, corridor clearances, and ceiling heights with your main contractor. Room Equipment Lists & Placement Reports “Design” Itemized room-by-room schedules of every medical and paramedical component — the single source of truth for owners, contractors, and suppliers. Final BOQ & Vendor List “Procurement” The definitive procurement bible for your project. Every piece of equipment, every specification, every cost — locked, verified, and ready to go to market. No ambiguity, no budget surprises, no room for error. Technical Specifications “Procurement” Vendor-neutral, itemized specifications for every piece of equipment and hospital furniture — written to the exact technology standard of your facility and ready for tendering. Procurement Management “Procurement” Site Supervision & Commissioning “Commissioning” Our engineers are on-site to supervise delivery, installation, testing, and commissioning — ensuring every item is installed to spec, every system is certified, and your facility is ready to operate on day one. Why choose us What sets us apart? We think before we draw Technology reports and budget forecasts before a single drawing is produced — so your decisions are informed, not reactive. We design with precision We procure without bias Vendor-neutral specs protect your budget and guarantee fair competition among the world's leading medical equipment suppliers. We stay until it works On-site supervision through installation, testing, and commissioning. We don't leave until your facility is fully operational.

specs.label: We manage the full tender cycle
specs.value: procurement plan, tender documents, evaluation framework, supplier follow-up, bid analysis, and final contract negotiations — securing best value without compromising quality.
50 detailed drawings with full MEP integration — every outlet, every clearance, every structural load, coordinated.
